notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Ryne Nelson picks off Denzer Guzman at 1st on throw to first baseman Pavin Smith.

notableEvents.label: Zach Neto GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Zach Neto grounds into a double play, third baseman Nolan Arenado to second baseman Ketel Marte to first baseman Pavin Smith. Oswald Peraza out at 2nd. Zach Neto out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Corbin Carroll steals (9) 2nd base. Corbin Carroll to 3rd. Corbin Carroll advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Logan O'Hoppe.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Diamondbacks challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: pitcher Walbert Ureña picks off Jordan Lawlar at 1st on throw to first baseman Nolan Schanuel.
